name: launcher_generator
description: Generates a standardized run.py launcher with ASCII title art, color-coded console output, in-terminal logging, and an interactive run-mode menu. Also generates platform shortcuts (run.bat for Windows, run.command for macOS). The launcher is zero-dependency (stdlib ANSI codes only). When a project has multiple run modes (CLI + API), the launcher offers a 'Run All' concurrent option.

project_dir.description: Absolute path to the software project directory where run.py will be created. In task-aware runs this is usually <task>/app.

project_name.description: Project name displayed in the ASCII title and header.

version.description: Project version displayed in the header.

description.description: Short project description shown below the title.

modes.description: List of run modes. Each mode has: key (menu number), label (display name), cmd (shell command to run), desc (optional description).

desc.description: Optional description shown below the label

color_scheme.description: Override default ANSI color codes. Keys: title, menu_key, menu_label, success, error, info, dim, accent. Values: ANSI code strings (e.g., '36' for cyan).

session_id.description: Session ID for log_manager integration. Auto-injected by the engine.
